texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lake Naivasha Lazarus Lodge is a premier 5-star luxury retreat nestled on the shores of Lake Naivasha in Kenya, oering a harmonious blend of modern elegance, personalized service and immersive natural beauty. Formerly known as Rossina Living, the lodge has evolved into a benchmark for hospitality in the region, emphasizing sustainable practices, community engagement and guest-centric experiences.
texts.text: Lake Naivasha Lazarus Lodge is a premier 5-star luxury retreat nestled on the shores of Lake Naivasha in Kenya, oering a harmonious blend of modern elegance, personalized service and immersive natural beauty. Formerly known as Rossina Living, the lodge has evolved into a benchmark for hospitality in the region, emphasizing sustainable practices, community engagement and guest-centric experiences.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Accommodation: Spacious Deluxe and Executive rooms/suites with premium amenities, starting from Ksh 6,000 per night.
texts.text: Accommodation: Spacious Deluxe and Executive rooms/suites with premium amenities, starting from Ksh 6,000 per night.

With a commitment to environmental stewardship and a prime location near wildlife attractions, Lazarus Lodge caters to leisure travelers, business professionals and event organizers seeking tranquility and excellence.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lake Naivasha Lazarus Lodge is nestled along Moi South Lake Road, Naivasha, oering guests breathtaking views of Lake Naivasha and its serene natural surroundings. The lodge provides a peaceful escapeinto nature, where guests can enjoy the tranquility of the lake, the vibrant birdlife and the lush greenery of the region.
texts.text: Lake Naivasha Lazarus Lodge is nestled along Moi South Lake Road, Naivasha, oering guests breathtaking views of Lake Naivasha and its serene natural surroundings. The lodge provides a peaceful escapeinto nature, where guests can enjoy the tranquility of the lake, the vibrant birdlife and the lush greenery of the region.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Its prime location makes it an ideal base for exploring Naivasha's attractions, including nearby national parks, game sanctuaries and scenic hiking destinations. Visitors can immerse themselves in the area's rich biodiversity, from gentle boat rides on the lake to guided excursions that showcase the beauty and wildlife of this iconic part of Kenya.
texts.text: Its prime location makes it an ideal base for exploring Naivasha's attractions, including nearby national parks, game sanctuaries and scenic hiking destinations. Visitors can immerse themselves in the area's rich biodiversity, from gentle boat rides on the lake to guided excursions that showcase the beauty and wildlife of this iconic part of Kenya.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Natural Attractions: Lake Naivasha, home to hippos and over 400 bird species; near Hell's Gate National Park.
texts.text: Natural Attractions: Lake Naivasha, home to hippos and over 400 bird species; near Hell's Gate National Park.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Proximity: 10-15 minutes from Naivasha town; close to Crater Lake Game Sanctuary.
texts.text: Proximity: 10-15 minutes from Naivasha town; close to Crater Lake Game Sanctuary.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Climate: Mild temperatures (15-25°C), with seasonal flamingo migrations.
texts.text: Climate: Mild temperatures (15-25°C), with seasonal flamingo migrations.

texts.orig: Technical Details: GPS: -0.7667° S, 36.4333° E; Elevation: 1,890 meters. The lodge oers secure parking and shuttle services for seamless access.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At Lake Naivasha Lazarus Lodge, we blend luxury, comfort and personalized attention befitting a 5-star retreat. From elegantly furnished rooms to gourmet dining and state-of-the-art conference facilities, every service is designed to exceed expectations under our SGA Promise -Smiles, Greetings, Assistance & Amazement , we ensure that every moment, whether for business or pleasure is memorable and truly exceptional.

From elegantly furnished rooms to gourmet dining and state-of-the-art conference facilities, every service is designed to exceed expectations under our SGA Promise -Smiles, Greetings, Assistance & Amazement , we ensure that every moment, whether for business or pleasure is memorable and truly exceptional.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At Lake Naivasha Lazarus Lodge, our guests enjoy a curated range of on-site activities blending leisure, wellness and productivity in a secure, eco-friendly setting. Our landscaped gardens which are maintained with water-ecient irrigation plans are perfect for guided morning yoga, meditation and nature walks. Evenings oer sunset viewings over Lake Naivasha and themed culinary events by our executive chef.
texts.text: At Lake Naivasha Lazarus Lodge, our guests enjoy a curated range of on-site activities blending leisure, wellness and productivity in a secure, eco-friendly setting. Our landscaped gardens which are maintained with water-ecient irrigation plans are perfect for guided morning yoga, meditation and nature walks. Evenings oer sunset viewings over Lake Naivasha and themed culinary events by our executive chef.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For corporate and group guests, our open field supports  structured  team-building  programs, including  strategy  games,  obstacle  challenges and  cooperative  workshops  facilitated  by trained coordinators and supported by modern sound systems. The wellness wing features spa and massage therapies in a climate-controlled treatment  room  with  optional  in-room aromatherapy.  High-speed  Wi-Fi  and  secure power backup ensure uninterrupted experiences for  all  activities  regardless  of  weather  or occupancy.
texts.text: For corporate and group guests, our open field supports  structured  team-building  programs, including  strategy  games,  obstacle  challenges and  cooperative  workshops  facilitated  by trained coordinators and supported by modern sound systems. The wellness wing features spa and massage therapies in a climate-controlled treatment  room  with  optional  in-room aromatherapy.
